seo.title: 11 Days | Philippines Sunrise Getaway
seo.description: Experience the Philippines Sunrise Tour! Begin in Cebu with historical tours and vibrant nightlife, explore Moalboal's thrilling canyoneering and mesmerizing sardine run, then unwind in Siargao with surfing, island hopping, and stunning sunsets. This adventure promises unforgettable moments from start to finish!

inclusions.label: Activities
inclusions.value: City Tour, Canyoneering, Snorkeling, Sardine Run, Surf, Island Hopping, Roadtrip

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: The trip starts in Cebu and finishes in Siargao Island.

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: Mactan-Cebu International Airport, or fly into Manila NAIA and then connect to Cebu. You can arrive at any time on Day 1, though the meet and greet dinner is at around 6pm.

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: Philippine Peso.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18-45, with most guests between 21-35 years old. Perfect for people of all different backgrounds to share travel experiences.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: The tour finishes in Siargao Island. You'll need to book a flight out of Siargao to either Manila or Cebu to catch your flight home.

itineraryEnrichment.activities: Meet and Greet (Dinner meals are not included)

highlightSubtitles.subtitle: Enjoy waterfalls and fresh water rivers
See hidden gems and surf in paradise
See the spectacle marine life
Catch some waves in crystal waters

seo.title: 11 Days | Philippines Sunset Getaway
seo.description: Experience the Philippines Sunset Tour! Start in Manila with vibrant nightlife and rich history, then head to Port Barton and El Nido for island hopping, snorkeling, and stunning sunsets. Unwind with kayaking, ziplining, and cultural experiences, ending with unforgettable moments in serene Isla Darocoton and adventurous El Nido.

details.route: Manila → Port Barton → El Nido → Isla Darocotan

inclusions.label: Accommodation
inclusions.value: 6 nights in Hotel, 4 nights in Beach Hut and Cottages

inclusions.label: Activities
inclusions.value: City Tour, Island Hopping, Zipline, Beach Day, Canopy Tour, Kayaking, Village Tour, Snorkeling, Cooking, Bonfire

inclusions.label: Others
value: Flight from Manila to Puerto Princesa

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: The tour starts in Manila and ends in El Nido, Palawan.

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: Manila NAIA International Airport

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly out from?
faqs.answer: The tour ends in El Nido - options include: (1) Fly from El Nido Airport to Manila or Cebu; (2) 6-hour van to Puerto Princesa then fly; (3) 5-6 hour ferry to Coron then fly from Coron Airport.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18-45, with most guests between 21-35 years old. It's perfect for people from diverse backgrounds to share travel experiences.

faqs.answer: Philippine Peso

faqs.answer: Cotton clothes suit the hot tropical climate. Tourists are expected to dress modestly on inhabited islands. Sandals are ideal as you may often go barefoot.

seo.title: Bhutan Quest — 7 Day Himalayan Adventure
seo.description: Join the 7-day Bhutan Quest: trek to Tiger's Nest, raft the Mo Chhu, visit Dzongs, and explore Thimphu. Small group, local guides, GBP £1,355.

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: The trip starts at Punakha and finishes in Paro.

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: Paro International Airport — Paro, Bhutan.

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: Comfortable summer clothes: shorts, sunglasses, hat, sunscreen. Bring hiking/trekking attire for treks and appropriate clothing for temple visits. A pre-departure pack will provide full details.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18—45, with most guests between 21—35 years old.

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: Bhutanese Ngultrum; Indian Rupee is also accepted. We recommend collecting cash from airport ATMs; ATMs are also available along the route.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: Paro International Airport — Paro.

itineraryEnrichment.activities: Punakha Dzong, Suspension Bridge, White-water rafting
Visit Gangteng Monastery, Nature trail of the valley, Visit Tashichho Dzong
City tour, Memorial Chorten, Folk Heritage Museum, National Library of Bhutan
National Museum of Bhutan, Paro Dzong, Namgay Artisanal Brewery

highlightSubtitles.subtitle: Visit one of Bhutan's most beautiful and famous Dzongs
Ride the white water rapids on Mo Chhu River followed by a beautiful riverside picnic
Hike to Bhutan's iconic Tiger's Nest Temple in Paro for breathtaking views of the valley and river
At 3000m, it's famed for 108 chortens honoring soldiers from the 2003 operation

seo.title: Nepal Horizons — 9 Day Kathmandu to Pokhara Himalayan Adventure
seo.description: Join the 9-day Nepal Horizons tour: Kathmandu's sacred temples, Chitwan jungle safari, Bandipur village, and a hike to Australian Base Camp. GBP £1,099.

inclusions.label: Transport
inclusions.value: Private vehicle for all sightseeing transfers

inclusions.label: Activities
inclusions.value: Visit Pashupatinath Temple, Visit Boudhanath Stupa, Bhaktapur Golden Gate, Village Walk & Sunset by Riverbank, Canoeing in Chitwan, Jeep Safari in Chitwan National Park, Hike to Ramkot Village, Boating on Phewa Lake, Visit Tal Barahi Temple, Hike to Australian Base Camp, Panoramic Annapurna & Fishtail Views

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: The trip begins and ends in Kathmandu, Nepal, with arrivals and departures through Tribhuvan International Airport (KTM).

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: Kathmandu — Tribhuvan International Airport (KTM).

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: Pack comfortable trekking clothes and sturdy hiking shoes for daily activities. Bring layers including light jackets for cooler evenings and warmer gear for trekking days. Don't forget sun protection such as a hat, sunglasses, and sunscreen. When visiting temples, ensure you have modest clothing that covers shoulders and knees.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18–45, with most guests between 21–35 years old.

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: The local currency is Nepalese Rupee (NPR). We advise guests to first collect cash from the airport ATMs; ATMs are also available along the way.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: Kathmandu — Tribhuvan International Airport (KTM).

itineraryEnrichment.activities: Meet & greet at the airport, Check in
Pashupatinath Temple, Boudhanath Stupa, Kathmandu Durbar Square, transfer to Bhaktapur, Golden Gate & Palace of 55 Windows
Transfer to Chitwan National Park, optional rafting on the Trishuli river
Canoeing, Jungle walk, Bird watching, Jeep safari & Tharu Tribal Dance
Transfer to Bandipur, Hike to Ramkot Village
Transfer to Pokhara, boating on Phewa Lake, Tal Barahi Temple visit
Scenic trek to Australian Base Camp

highlightSubtitles.subtitle: Explore Pashupatinath & Durbar Square, the spiritual heart of Nepal
Jungle walk & jeep safari in search of rhinos, tigers & rare birds
Charming bazaar streets for the authentic rural life
Scenic trek with panoramic views of Annapurna and Manaslu

seo.title: India Discovery Tour — 13 Day Delhi to Agra Adventure
seo.description: Join the 13-day India Discovery Tour: Taj Mahal, Mehrangarh Fort, Lake Pichola cruise, Amer Fort, and a safari in Ranthambore National Park. GBP £1,099.

details.route: New Delhi → Jodhpur → Udaipur → Jaipur → Sawai Madhopur → Agra

inclusions.label: Activities
inclusions.value: Sightseeing Old and New Delhi, Visit Mehrangarh Fort, Visit Ranakpur Jain Temples, Cruise over Lake Pichola, Visit Amer Fort, Canter Safari into Ranthambhore National Park, Visit the Taj Mahal

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: The trip starts in New Delhi and finishes in New Delhi.

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi International Airport, New Delhi.

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: For summer (March—June): light breathable fabrics, comfortable sandals, sunglasses, hat, sunscreen. For cooler months (October—February): pack layers, light jacket or sweater, comfortable walking shoes, scarf for temple visits. Always bring a shawl for religious sites.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18—45, with most guests between 21—35 years old.

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: The local currency is the Indian Rupee. We recommend collecting cash from the airport ATMs; ATMs are also available along the way.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: Indira Gandhi International Airport, New Delhi.

Sightseeing — Jama Masjid, Raj Ghat, India Gate — Overnight Train
City Palace Complex — Sahelion-Ki-Bari — Lake Pichola
Amer Fort — City Palace Museum — Birla Temple

seo.title: 13 Days | India Holi + Yoga with Dev — I'm Here Travels
seo.description: It's time to start exploring India. This tour is perfect for those first time travellers that have always wanted to explore the wonders of India but don't want to do it alone. Experience the Taj Mahal, Pink Palaces of Jaipur, Ranthambhore safari, and the colours of Holi.

inclusions.label: Activities

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: To Indira Ghandi International Airport — New Delhi.

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: Pack comfortable clothes suitable for summer: shorts, sunglasses, hat, and sunscreen. Bring beach attire and light jackets for cooler evenings. Don't forget appropriate clothing for mosque/temple visits, but not to worry a pre departure pack will provide all this info before your trip.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18-45, with most guests between 21-35 years old. It's perfect for people from diverse backgrounds to share travel experiences.

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: The local currency in India is Indian Rupee. We do advise guests to first collect cash from the airport ATMs but there will also be various ATMs available along the way.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: From Indira Ghandi International Airport — New Delhi.

seo.title: 11 Days | Sri Lanka Wander Tour
seo.description: Embark on the Sri Lanka Wander Tour and experience the island from Negombo to Mirissa. Explore the Dambulla Cave Temple, hike Pidurangala Rock, cycle through local villages, climb Sigiriya Rock Fortress, discover Kandy's temples and markets, ride the scenic train from Nanu Oya to Ella, and unwind with wildlife, surfing, and beach time along the south coast.

details.route: Negombo → Sigiriya → Kandy → Ella → Yala → Mirissa

inclusions.label: Activities
inclusions.value: Dambulla Cave Temple, Pidurangala Rock, cycling tour, Sigiriya Rock Fortress, Kandy city tour, Nanu Oya to Ella train ride, Ella Rock, safari game drive, Galle city tour, surfing in Weligama

inclusions.label: Others

faqs.answer: The trip starts in Negombo and finishes in Mirissa.

faqs.answer: Colombo Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB)

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly out from?
faqs.answer: Colombo Bandaranaike International Airport (CMB). They can organise a taxi back to Colombo at an additional cost (cheaper if shared with other guests).

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18-45, with most guests between 21-35 years old. It's perfect for people from diverse backgrounds to share travel experiences.

seo.title: China Discovery — 10 Day Beijing to Shanghai Tour
seo.description: Join the 10-day China Discovery tour: Forbidden City, Mutianyu Great Wall, Shanghai Tower, Zhujiajiao Water Town. Small group, local guides, GBP £1,200.

value: Private vehicle for all transfers & sightseeing

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: The trip begins in Beijing and ends in Shanghai.

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: Beijing Capital International Airport (PEK).

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: Pack long pants, lighter pants or skirt/dress, tops long and short sleeved, sweater, light jacket, warmer jacket for Beijing nights, comfortable footwear, outfits for dinners, underwear, socks, sunglasses, scarf, hat. Temperatures vary between night and day — layering options are best.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18–45, with most guests between 21–35 years old. It's perfect for people from diverse backgrounds to share travel experiences.

faqs.answer: The local currency is the Chinese Yuan, also known as Renminbi (RMB). We advise guests to first collect cash from the airport ATMs; ATMs are also available along the route.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: Shanghai Pudong International Airport (PVG).

seo.title: 10 Days | Tanzania Exploration
seo.description: Have you always dreamed of visiting Tanzania, seeing Mount Kilimanjaro, going on a safari, and maybe even exploring Zanzibar? Now's your chance! This tour offers you the opportunity to experience all of that-mini trekking Kilimanjaro, guided game drives (safari) to witness the incredible wildlife, and marine life, followed by relaxing on the stunning beaches of Zanzibar. Join us for an unforgettable adventure and make lifelong friends along the way!

inclusions.label: Transport

value: Hot Springs, Mount Kilimanjaro Day Hike, Tarangire National Park, Safari Game Drive, Sunset Cruise

seo.title: 10 Days | Tanzania Exploration (Danielle & Erin)
seo.description: This tour will let you experience all of that with Mini Trekking Kilimanjaro, guided game drives to experience the vast wildlife and marine life and then finishing the tour off on the amazing beaches in Zanzibar. Join us to experience these amazing destinations and meet people who will become friend's for life!

inclusions.label: Transport
inclusions.value: Private tour bus, Safari Land Cruiser, Airport transfer (excluding the airport drop-off on the last day)

inclusions.label: Activities
value: Game drives in Tarangire National Park

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?

seo.title: New Zealand Expedition — 15 Day Auckland to Queenstown Adventure
seo.description: Join the 15-day New Zealand Expedition: Auckland, Raglan surf, Waitomo glowworms, Rotorua, Milford Sound cruise, glacier adventures, and Queenstown thrills.

details.route: North: Auckland → Raglan → Waitomo → Rotorua → Wellington

inclusions.label: Transport
inclusions.value: Private Coach, Ferry (Wellington → Picton), Coastal Pacific Scenic Train (Picton → Christchurch)

inclusions.label: Activities
inclusions.value: Optional: Whakarewarewa Living Maori Village and Traditional Hangi Lunch, Lake Tarawera Water Taxi, Guided Hike & Natural Hot Pools, Kiwi Hatchery Conservation Experience, Time Tripper Underwater Experience, Milford Sound Day Trip

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: The trip starts in Auckland (Day 1 – Arrival and Hotel Check-in) and ends in Queenstown (Day 15 – Departure and Airport Transfers).

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: You need to fly into Auckland Airport (AKL) to start the tour. For departure, you'll fly out of Queenstown Airport (ZQN) at the end of the trip.

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: In New Zealand during spring/summer, expect mild to warm temperatures with cooler evenings. Pack lightweight breathable clothing for daytime, warm layers (hoodies, fleece) and a windbreaker or waterproof jacket for evenings, sturdy walking/hiking shoes, swimwear, and smart casual for cultural evenings. Essentials: sunglasses, hat, sunscreen (UV is strong in NZ), daypack, reusable water bottle. Layering is key.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18–45, with most guests between 21–35 years old.

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: The local currency is the New Zealand Dollar (NZD / NZ$). Credit and debit cards are widely accepted, but it's handy to have some cash for small purchases or remote areas.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: You will fly out from Queenstown Airport (ZQN) at the end of the tour.

seo.title: Argentina's Wonders — I'm Here Travels
seo.description: Discover the vibrant culture and breathtaking landscapes of Argentina on an epic 11-day adventure. Begin in Buenos Aires, where the energy of tango and rich local cuisine will sweep you off your feet.

inclusions.label: Others
value: Transfer to El Chalten, in the way: trekking in the petrified forest

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer:
Start Point: Buenos Aires (Day 1 — Arrival and Welcome Dinner)
End Point: Puerto Iguazú (Day 11 — Departure)

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: Fly into Ezeiza International Airport (EZE) in Buenos Aires to start.

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer:
It's February — summer in Argentina! Pack for variety:
• Buenos Aires (20°C–30°C / 68°F–86°F): Light layers, comfy shoes, semi-formal for tango night.
• El Chaltén & El Calafate (5°C–15°C / 41°F–59°F): Warm layers, waterproof jacket, trekking shoes for glacier fun.
• Puerto Iguazú (25°C–35°C / 77°F–95°F): Breathable clothes, quick-dry gear for the boat trip, sunscreen.
• Essentials: Sunglasses, hat, small backpack.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Most activities suit adventurers 18–45 (typical guests 21–35). Minitrekking is for ages 8–65 only, with health restrictions (no exceptions).

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: In Buenos Aires and Calafate, the currency is Argentine Pesos (ARS), though US dollars are widely accepted. In Brazil, the currency is the Real (R$). Iguazu Falls straddles both countries, so you'll use pesos on the Argentine side and reais on the Brazilian side. Credit cards are accepted in most destinations throughout your trip.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer:
Aeropuerto Internacional Cataratas del Iguazú (IGR). From here, you have three options:
1. Fly to Rio de Janeiro and continue with the Brazil program.
2. Return to Buenos Aires and take your flight home from there.
3. Explore direct flight options between Iguazú and your home destination.

faqs.question: Optional Trip — Rio Carnival
faqs.answer:
The actual Carnival Parades run from February 28th to March 5th. For those interested in attending, we can assist with accommodations and parade tickets:

• Double Sharing: GBP 1,200
• Triple Sharing: GBP 1,100

Includes: 4 nights with breakfast at Regency Park Hotel, transfer between Hotel and Sambadrome, ticket for one night at the Carnival Parade (grandstand sector 5).

Add-on parade nights:
• 2nd parade night ticket + transfer: GBP 150
• 3 parade nights tickets + transfers: GBP 275

seo.title: Brazil's Treasures — I'm Here Travels
seo.description: Get ready to fall in love with Brazil—loud, colorful, and alive at every turn. From exploring the vibrant city of São Paulo to wandering the cobbled charm of Paraty, this 10-day adventure is full of energy and discovery.

inclusions.label: Activities
inclusions.value: City Tours, Beaches, Sugarloaf & Christ the Redeemer Tour, Sambadrome Carnival Experience, Rio Helicopter Ride

inclusions.label: Others
value: Entrance fees to all major attractions and sites
Private group experiences in Rio de Janeiro
Small group size to ensure personalized experiences
All taxes and service charges included

inclusions.label: What's NOT included
inclusions.value: International flights to/from the destination, Travel insurance, Visas (if required), Personal expenses & optional activities

faqs.question: Where does the trip start & finish?
faqs.answer: It starts at São Paulo and finishes in Rio de Janeiro.

faqs.question: Which airport do I need to fly into?
faqs.answer: São Paulo/Guarulhos International Airport (GRU).

faqs.question: What should I wear?
faqs.answer: Pack comfortable clothes suitable for summer: shorts, sunglasses, hat, and sunscreen. Bring beach attire and light jackets for cooler evenings. Don't forget a semi-formal outfit for the tango night in Buenos Aires.

faqs.question: Do you have an age limit for tours?
faqs.answer: Our tours cater to adventurous travelers aged 18—45, with most guests between 21—35 years old. It's perfect for people from diverse backgrounds to share travel experiences.

faqs.question: What is the local currency?
faqs.answer: In Brazil, the currency is the Real (R$). However, credit cards are accepted in most destinations throughout your trip.

faqs.question: Which airport do I fly out from?
faqs.answer: Rio de Janeiro/Galeão International Airport (GIG).

itineraryEnrichment.activities: Christ the Redeemer, Sugarloaf Mountain, Cathedral & Sambadrome
